title: YLAB - 20 Jungle Safari Party Invitations – Kids Birthday Invites with Orange Envelopes – Animal Themed Party
features: 🦓 20 JUNGLE SAFARI PARTY INVITES – Set the scene for an unforgettable wild party with these fun and vibrant jungle-themed invitations, featuring adorable safari animals like giraffes, zebras, monkeys, leopards, and crocodiles.
📏 PERFECT SIZE & HIGH-QUALITY – Each invitation measures 19 x 13.5 cm, offering plenty of space to write party details while being easy for little hands to hold.
📩 COMPLETE SET WITH ENVELOPES – Includes 20 invitations and 20 orange envelopes, making it easy to send out your invites in style.
✍️ PERSONALISED FILL-IN STYLE – With dedicated spaces to write your party details, these invitations add a personal touch and make planning your event simple.
🎉 IDEAL FOR VARIOUS EVENTS – Perfect for kids' birthday parties, school events, classmates, baby showers, and safari-themed celebrations.
description: Get Ready for a Wild Party! 🦓🎉 Make your child’s birthday or special occasion roar with excitement with these 20 Jungle Safari Party Invitations ! Featuring adorable animal illustrations , these invites set the tone for a fun-filled adventure . Whether you're celebrating a birthday, baby shower, or school event , these high-quality invitations are the perfect choice. Why Choose Our Jungle Party Invitations? ✅ Vibrant Jungle Animal Design – Featuring giraffes, leopards, crocodiles, zebras, and monkeys, these invitations create an exciting safari experience . ✅ Premium Quality Paper – Thick and durable for a professional feel and easy writing . ✅ Personalised Touch – Simple fill-in-the-blanks format to make each invite unique. ✅ Perfect for All Ages – Suitable for boys, girls, and jungle-loving partygoers of all ages. ✅ Great for Bulk Invitations – Ideal for classmates, friends, and family gatherings. What’s Included? ✔️ 20 Jungle-Themed Invitations (19 x 13.5 cm) ✔️ 20 Matching Orange Envelopes 📢 Order Now and make your child’s jungle party an unforgettable experience! 🌿
